subcodes.first_line: Light and spirit and mercy and glory be upon thee, O Manifestation of the Infinite and Dayspring of faithfulness among men [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: النور و الروح و الرحمه و البهاء علیک یا مظهر الا بعد لا و مشرق الوفاء بین
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @visitation Tablets, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @eulogies; reminiscences, @martyrs and martyrdom
